questions.question:
A PVC expansion diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `resize-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `pv-resize-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetPvc` is `analytics-data`
- `pvcInventory` is `kubectl get pvc analytics-data -n pv-resize-lab -o wide`
- `requestedSizeCheck` is `kubectl get pvc analytics-data -n pv-resize-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.resources.requests.storage}'`
- `currentCapacityCheck` is `kubectl get pvc analytics-data -n pv-resize-lab -o jsonpath='{.status.capacity.storage}'`
- `storageClassCheck` is `kubectl get pvc analytics-data -n pv-resize-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.storageClassName}'`
- `allowExpansionCheck` is `kubectl get storageclass expandable-reports -o jsonpath='{.allowVolumeExpansion}'`
- `conditionCheck` is `kubectl get pvc analytics-data -n pv-resize-lab -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[*].type}'`
- `mountPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment analytics-api -n pv-resize-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].mountPath}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n pv-resize-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm requested size, current capacity, resize support, PVC conditions, and mount path before changing storage manifests`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/resize-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/resize-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `PVC Inventory`, `Resize Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not edit or delete the PVC, do not restart the Deployment, and do not patch the live StorageClass during this drill.

verification.description: The PVC resize diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended PVC target, exact resize inspection commands, StorageClass expansion evidence, condition checks, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact PVC inventory, resize, StorageClass, and workload mount inspection commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe resize remediation guidance is removed
